title: Tweaks Delight
description: Add many more quality of life features to Farmer's Delight, see recipes and find ingredients quickly.
body:
![Tweaks Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k4B832GB/images/9fac44efe5dbddd6e848320c9aa8c0ccfe186c80.png)
**Always seem to forget cooking recipes? Is it hard to find ingredients in your messy chests?** Tweaks Delight adds many quality of life features to Farmer's Delight, making it easier for players to make meals, find ingredients, and quickly take a look at their Cooking Pot or Skillet. [Check out the gallery to see more](https://modrinth.com/project/tweaks-delight/gallery). ## 🍽️ Features - Simply look at a food item displayed in an item frame to instantly view its cooking recipe. - Hover your crosshair over a Cooking Pot or Skillet to have a quick look of the ingredients inside and the dish currently being cooked. - When inside a chest or your inventory, hold Shift over any meal to highlight the exact ingredients required, making it easier to pull resources when all your items are everywhere.
## 🛠️ Works With - All Farmer's Delight add-ons available - Fast Item Frames _Not working with your favorite add-on? [Let me know](https://github.com/axperty/tweaksdelight/issues/new)_. ![Tweaks Delight Images](https://i.imgur.com/6PUVLv3.gif) [![Saving for a laptop!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rlXSyLg/images/491c87c96cd602ec45774ce0b0cb9fe4d25ba074.png)](https://paypal.me/kevgelhorn)
